[Southern Baltic] POLISH NAV WARN 073
130600 UTC APR
POLISH NAV WARN 073/26
SOUTHERN BALTIC. POLISH COAST
DUE TO MILITARY EXERCISES ZONE IS CLOSED FOR SHIPPING AND FISHERY:
S-6 CENTERED 54-39.3N 016-37.0E
ON 2026-04-13 TO 2026-04-18
FROM 06:00 TO 21:59.
TIME IN UTC.
ZONE IS CLOSED
CANCEL THIS MSG 182159 UTC APR
